g.text: Auto mode uses gated alert state,
IVI consumes ambient mode as a
1. Input_Console can request Cmd::ambientModeCmd in manual mode
2. CGW provides the gated alert context for automatic mode
3. BCM decides the final ambient mode / color / pattern
4. BCM publishes frmAmbientControlMsg and Body::* readback
5. Ambient hardware and IVI both reflect the BCM-owned result
